creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
In two systems (both AMD-based) fetching sources from git also when trying to compile within bhyve in the past weeks I keep getting similar errors when building

# git log --oneline -5
0da2f02c1b2a (HEAD -> stable/13, origin/stable/13) netinet: re-read IP length after PFIL hook
12ce57e6d3e7 pcib: Allocate the memory BAR with the MSI-X table.
7148e1593b68 <sys/cdefs.h>: Decay expression passed to fallback version of __generic()
ed19cb27bde8 ether_demux: Defer stripping the Ethernet header.
5771c3bd1df8 systat: Fix a bunch of use after frees in fetch_ifstat().

# uname -a:
13.2-STABLE FreeBSD 13.2-STABLE stable/13-n254963-5cec4958142b GENERIC amd64

contents of /etc/make

BOOTWAIT=0
NO_X=true
OPTIONS_UNSET=X11
WITHOUT="X11"
WITHOUT_FONTCONFIG=YES

contents of /etc/src.conf
WITHOUT_ASSERT_DEBUG=
WITHOUT_ATM=
WITHOUT_BIND_DNSSEC=
WITHOUT_BIND_ETC=
WITHOUT_BIND_MTREE=
WITHOUT_BIND_NAMED=
WITHOUT_BLUETOOTH=
WITHOUT_BSDINSTALL=
WITHOUT_DEBUG_FILES=
WITHOUT_FLOPPY=
WITHOUT_GAMES=
WITHOUT_HTML=
WITHOUT_I4B=
WITHOUT_INFO=
WITHOUT_KERNEL_SYMBOLS=
WITHOUT_LIB32=
WITHOUT_LPR=
WITHOUT_RESCUE=
WITHOUT_SHAREDOCS=
WITHOUT_SYSCONS=
WITHOUT_TESTS=
WITHOUT_WIRELESS=
WITHOUT_WPA_SUPPLICANT_EAPOL=
WITH_BIND_LIBS=



--- ObjectYAML/ELFYAML.o ---
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.freebsd.org/submit/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
